name: Computer Science
description: Covers programming, algorithms, data structures, and software engineering principles.

name: Mathematics
description: Covers pure and applied mathematics including calculus, algebra, and statistics.

name: Physics
description: Covers classical mechanics, electromagnetism, quantum physics, and thermodynamics.

name: Chemistry
description: Covers organic, inorganic, and physical chemistry including reactions, bonding, and laboratory techniques.

name: Biology
description: Covers cell biology, genetics, ecology, human anatomy, and life sciences.

name: English
description: Covers literature, technical writing, communication, and language skills.

name: History
description: Covers world history, civilizations, historical events, and historiographical methods.

name: Geography
description: Covers physical and human geography, cartography, climate, and geospatial analysis.

name: Economics
description: Covers microeconomics, macroeconomics, market theory, and economic policy.

name: Business Administration
description: Covers management, marketing, finance, entrepreneurship, and organizational behavior.

name: Engineering
description: Covers core engineering principles including mechanics, thermodynamics, and design.

name: Psychology
description: Covers human behavior, cognitive processes, mental health, and psychological research methods.

name: Sociology
description: Covers social structures, culture, institutions, and human society dynamics.

name: Political Science
description: Covers political theory, governance, international relations, and public policy.

name: Philosophy
description: Covers logic, ethics, metaphysics, epistemology, and philosophical inquiry.

name: Education
description: Covers pedagogy, curriculum design, educational psychology, and teaching methodologies.

name: Fine Arts
description: Covers visual arts, drawing, painting, sculpture, and art history.

name: Music
description: Covers music theory, composition, performance, and the history of musical traditions.

name: Physical Education
description: Covers fitness, sports science, health education, and physical wellness.

name: Law
description: Covers legal theory, constitutional law, criminal law, and judicial processes.
